name: fleet managers overseeing 10-50 vehicles tool
description: For fleet managers overseeing 10-50 vehicles, inconsistent maintenance scheduling causes unexpected breakdowns. We automate follow-up maintenance scheduling instead of manual tracking of maintenance schedules and inspection reports.
problem_solved: Inconsistent vehicle maintenance scheduling leads to unexpected breakdowns.
features: simple dashboard for tracking vehicle status
